name: Kinshasa
description: Cultural and economic capital of the DRC, rich in music and nightlife.

name: Lubumbashi
description: Industrial center of Katanga, with many modern salons.

name: Mbuji-Mayi
description: A dynamic mining city with an active community of stylists.

name: Goma
description: Picturesque city on the shores of Lake Kivu, known for its festivals and local events.
